name: Fresh Tomatoes Stuffed with Tuna Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/8 teaspoon paprika (optional), as garnish for the hard-boiled egg
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and core 4 medium tomatoes or 4 large tomatoes.
2. Prepare any variation of Tuna Spread recipe in this cookbook. For standard version, add chopped parsley.
3. Stuff tomatoes with tuna mixture.
4. Wash lettuce leaves and place on individual plates.
5. Place a stuffed tomato on each leaf.
6. Chill for at least 20 minutes.
7. On each serving plate, place half of an egg cut into wedges alongside the stuffed tomato. Sprinkle with paprika.
8. Garnish tomato with a sprig of parsley (optional).
Description: "Summer's bounty stuffed with standard tuna salad or Indian Tuna Salad."
Cuisine: "Indian"
